# ttd log

Log time retrospectively with a natural-language time expression. See [Tracking time](../../guides/tracking-time.md) for workflows and [Time expressions](../time-expressions.md) for the full syntax.

```console
ttd log [OPTIONS] [ARGS]
```

Log completed work from a natural-language time spec.

**Parameters**:

* `SPEC, --spec`: e.g. "today 8am to 5pm", "2h", "yesterday 9-11:30"
* `--project, -p`:
* `--client`:
* `--note, -n`:
* `--tags`: Comma-separated
* `--billable, --no-billable`:   *\[default: True\]*
* `--force, --no-force`: Log even if it overlaps  *\[default: False\]*
* `--interactive, --no-interactive, -i`: Fill remaining fields via a form  *\[default: False\]*
